title: Pull request status badge component with color-coded indicators
purpose: Displays a clickable badge showing the status of a pull request with color coding based on check results.
module_context: Exports a React functional component PRStatusBadge that uses a custom hook to access agent store data and a helper function to determine badge colors.

steps.content: Return a default slate color if no checks are provided.
Convert the checks string to lowercase for consistent comparison.
IF the checks string contains pass, success, or is exactly green, return green.
ELSE IF the checks string contains fail, error, or is exactly red, return red.
ELSE IF the checks string contains pend, running, progress, or is exactly amber or yellow, return amber.
ELSE return the default slate color.
Extract the session ID from the component props.
Access the pull request status data for the given session ID from the agent store.
IF no pull request data exists for the session, return null.
Determine the badge color based on the pull request checks using the helper function.
Render a clickable anchor element with the pull request number and status color.
Include a small circular indicator with white color and 85% opacity next to the number.
